import json
with open\('data/game_data.json'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
d = data['2024']
print\('=== RACES ==='\)
names = [r['name'] for r in d['races']]
from collections import Counter
dups = [n for n,c in Counter\(names\).items\(\) if c > 1]
print\('Duplicates:', dups[:20]\)
print\('Total races:', len\(names\)\)
print\('Sample:', names[:15]\)
print\(\)
print\('=== CLASSES ==='\)
names = [r['name'] for r in d['classes']]
dups = [n for n,c in Counter\(names\).items\(\) if c > 1]
print\('Duplicates:', dups[:20]\)
print\('Total classes:', len\(names\)\)
print\('All:', names\)
print\(\)
print\('=== BACKGROUNDS ==='\)
names = [r['name'] for r in d['backgrounds']]
dups = [n for n,c in Counter\(names\).items\(\) if c > 1]
print\('Duplicates:', dups[:20]\)
print\('Total:', len\(names\)\)
")
